g.text: `align_face` should be the same face, but
detectors, and the number detected may be
not consistent, so they may be not the
caricature portrait, helmet on, man on motorcycle, huge
cheeky smile, eyes wide with excitement, alpine mountain
road, cartoon style, humor illustration, cream vignette
border, faded soft edges, t-shirt print design, no text,
A person sits in a cafe, smiling warmly at the camera, captured in a mid-shot
A close-up portrait of a person
